## Description

Brief description of your project or changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Project folder uses Title Case with spaces
- [ ] Includes a `README.md` with dataset info, tech stack, results, and run instructions
- [ ] Includes a `requirements.txt`
- [ ] Large datasets (>10 MB) are hosted externally with download links
- [ ] No trained model binaries committed (provide training instructions instead)
- [ ] Notebook runs end-to-end without errors
